items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
5BG287, Miu New Tassel Crossbody Bag. Made of top-grade imported lambskin, the leather is soft and premium. The bag features a pleated snap closure and tassel openings on both sides. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality. The full-metal logo on the front adds a signature element, while the vintage gold hardware and satin lining complete the look. Equipped with a zippered pocket. The long wrist strap is suitable for hand-carry or underarm shoulder carry. Vintage style, high-end and free-spirited. Dimensions: 35X18X9CM, comes with original packaging

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
5BA289 New Shell Bag. The simple design continues Miu's lazy American old-money style, using top-grade imported calfskin with a high-quality, soft texture. The curved sides add a more stylish look. The zipper opens instantly to become a large tote. The long handle design offers greater practicality, suitable for underarm or hand-carry. The simple and casual style, with a super large capacity, is an excellent choice for commuting or shopping. Lined with new linen, with a zippered pocket. Dimensions: 38 X 27 X 16 cm
